provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: This Act may be cited as the Bills of Sale (Registration) Act, and shall be read as one with the Lands and Deeds Registry Act. [Cap. 185]

provisions.title: Non-application of certain provisions of the Bills of Sale Acts
provisions.content: It is hereby declared for the removal of doubt that the provisions of the Bills of Sale Acts, 1878-1882, of the United Kingdom, requiring the registration and re-registration of Bills of Sale under those Acts, are not in force and have not, since the commencement of the Lands and Deeds Registry Act, been in force in Zambia. [Cap. 185] History of this document 31 December 1996 this version Consolidation 11 August 1961 Commenced Related documents [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Subscribe Subscribe to our newsletter for updates and news.
